humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 blockers after rank_facts observed_at validation was tightened. Earlier replay determinism and idempotency critical-window gaps remain non-blocking follow-up work.

findings.title: DLsite demand replay is not deterministic for non-rank observedAt values
findings.description: Non-rank DLsite demand facts may omit observedAt and rely on repository insertion time, so replaying writes before an import marker is committed can change observation timestamps.

evidence.detail: Catalog audit found non-rank demand facts can reach repository persistence without observedAt while the repository defaults missing observedAt to new Date().

findings.impact: Crash replay or retry before commitStepImport can produce nondeterministic demand fact rows for the same recorded fixture.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: DLsite demand facts receive deterministic observedAt values before repository persistence.
Interrupted replay before imported marker commit produces stable demand fact rows.
Tests cover non-rank demand facts during replay.

proposedDagNode.title: Deterministic DLsite demand observedAt replay
proposedDagNode.summary: Make DLsite demand fact observation timestamps deterministic under recorded importer replay.
deliverables: Deterministic observedAt assignment for non-rank DLsite demand facts
Repository assertion for stable demand fact rows
acceptanceCriteria: Non-rank DLsite demand facts do not rely on insertion wall-clock time for observedAt.
Reprocessing the same recorded demand payload before commitStepImport produces stable rows.
Tests cover dl_count, rating, wishlist, work_type, and translation_tree facts under replay.

findings.title: DLsite idempotency tests only prove checkpoint skip behavior
findings.description: Idempotency tests assert a second run has no fetched steps, but do not exercise the critical window where facts were written and the imported marker was not committed.

evidence.detail: Catalog audit identified checkpoint skip coverage but no replay of already-written demand facts before commitStepImport.

findings.impact: The CATALOG-065 idempotency contract may still fail for DLsite demand if a process crashes after fact writes but before import marker commit.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: A test replays DLsite demand fact writes after clearing or withholding the imported marker.
Replay does not duplicate or mutate existing demand facts.
The test covers normal and parse-drift fixture paths where relevant.

acceptanceCriteria: Failure-injection coverage includes DLsite demand replay after facts are written but before commitStepImport is recorded.
The DLsite demand replay path proves no duplicate or mutated demand facts are produced.
auditFocus: Checkpoint skip mistaken for idempotent replay
Duplicate DLsite demand facts after interrupted import
existingDagNodeUpdate.notes: Extends the existing catalog ingest failure-injection harness follow-up instead of creating a separate duplicate idempotency node.

findings.title: Roadmap DLsite app verification filter runs broader tests than intended
findings.description: The roadmap verification command uses a package test filter that can run broader app suites rather than only the DLsite demand test file.

evidence.detail: Catalog audit observed pnpm --filter @itotori/app test -- dlsite-demand invoking unrelated server tests in the sandbox.

findings.impact: Focused verification for CATALOG-069 can become noisy or environment-sensitive, hiding the intended DLsite demand behavior check.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: CATALOG-069 or a follow-up verification node uses a direct DLsite demand app test command.
The targeted command does not start unrelated server/listener tests.
Roadmap verification remains valid under public CI and local sandboxed runs.

proposedDagNode.title: Targeted DLsite demand app verification command
proposedDagNode.summary: Replace broad DLsite demand app test filtering with a direct test-file verification command.
acceptanceCriteria: The DLsite demand app verification command runs the intended test file without unrelated server/listener tests.
The command works in local sandbox and public CI environments.
Roadmap verification still names a concrete runnable command.
auditFocus: Verification commands that depend on unrelated server sockets
